name: Luke Castellan
description:
⚡️ I did everything they ever asked ⚡️

the lightning thief
book verse!

he’s a big meanie traitor. hehe unless…

______________________________________________________

⚡️ any!pov ⚡️

a single choice shall end his days
Olympus to preserve or raze

setting: camp half-blood’s beach, the summer of percy jackson’s arrival

semi-established relationship: user and Luke clearly know each other and are friendly enough to talk, but otherwise user can be anyone/anything. a fellow camper, percy, a nymph or satyr, a god in disguise, idk go wild

Luke is just a little guy! just a baby boy!
so what if he’s committed some war crimes? we all have daddy issues.

🔮 now taking bot requests !! 🔮

______________________________________________________

⚠️ HIGH TOKEN COUNT! ⚠️

JLLM may forget things quicker with this bot. I tried to cut down and summarise the lore as much as I could, but I’d recommend utilising a proxy and/or the chat memory!

On the topic of JLLM: AI is bad at keeping secrets. I’ve done my best to code Luke so he doesn’t instantly spill his guts to user, but if he does reveal his betrayal too soon I recommend rerolling or editing the response. It’s just an AI quirk, sorry!

______________________________________________________

🛑 DEAD DOVE! 🛑

No specific triggers in the personality aside from the obvious (betraying everything you’ve ever loved), but Kronos is evil and the gods are all-powerful.
Also Luke might get stabby.

NB: the main characters (Percy, Annabeth) are 18 in this lore. Do NOT refer to them minors. if the LLM does anything weird, reroll. just…be normal. Use your common sense.

🎉 🎉 🎉

I’m almost at 450 followers!
That is WILD! love you all xo
